courses.name: AI Foundations Bootcamp
syllabus: Working with APIs and automation tools
courses.eligibility: Basic programming knowledge and comfort using a computer regularly.
courses.timings: Weekend batches: Saturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM IST.
courses.mode: Online live classes with recorded sessions.
courses.certification: Certificate of completion is provided after the final project submission.

courses.name: Data Science Career Program
courses.eligibility: Graduates, final-year students, or working professionals with basic math and programming exposure.
courses.timings: Weekday batches: Monday, Wednesday, Friday, 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM IST.
courses.mode: Hybrid learning: live online sessions plus self-paced assignments.
courses.certification: Industry-ready certificate and capstone review upon completion.

courses.name: Automation with Python
syllabus: Working with files, email, and spreadsheets
courses.eligibility: Beginners with basic Python syntax knowledge.
courses.timings: Evening batches: Tuesday and Thursday, 6:30 PM to 8:00 PM IST.

courses.name: Full Stack Web Development
syllabus: Deployment, GitHub workflow, and portfolio project
courses.eligibility: Beginners and students who are comfortable with basic computer usage.
courses.timings: Weekday evening batches: Monday, Wednesday, Friday, 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM IST.
courses.mode: Online live classes with hands-on assignments.
courses.certification: Certificate and project portfolio review after final deployment.

courses.name: Cloud Computing Essentials
syllabus: Mini project: deploy a web app on cloud
courses.eligibility: Students, IT beginners, or professionals who want cloud fundamentals.
courses.timings: Weekend batches: Saturday and Sunday, 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM IST.
courses.mode: Online instructor-led sessions with lab practice.
courses.certification: Completion certificate with cloud project evaluation.

courses.name: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
courses.eligibility: Basic networking or programming knowledge is helpful but not mandatory.
courses.timings: Weekend morning batches: Saturday and Sunday, 9:30 AM to 11:30 AM IST.
courses.mode: Online live classes with guided security labs.
courses.certification: Certificate of completion after lab assessment.

default_contact.hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM IST
